listOfQuestions.question: Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: Managing deployment and operation of many containers?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: Managing infrastructure through versioned configuration files?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: Automatically building and testing frequent code changes?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: Automatically releasing validated changes to users?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: An automated sequence of build, test, and release steps?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: A built output produced by a software pipeline?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: A named value supplied to a running process?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: Protecting credentials used by systems and applications?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: A component that distributes traffic across servers?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: Adjusting computing capacity as demand changes?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: Collecting information about system health and behavior?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: A numeric measurement collected over time?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: A recorded event from a system or application?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: A record of a request moving through system components?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: An unplanned service disruption or degradation?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: Returning a deployed system to a previous version?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: Rolling out a change to a small group before wider release?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: A switch that controls behavior without redeploying code?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: A packaged runtime environment for an application?
Which Cloud and DevOps concept is described by this clue: A template used to create containers?
